title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates:
Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank Asia Pacific Associates!
